subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath come upon the clouds is verily the Promised One foretold in the Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی علی السحاب انه لهو الموعود فی الکتب و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
